title: bonellia seleriana
intro: Bonellia seleriana, a species of flowering plant in the family Papaveraceae, is native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Guatemala. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bonellia seleriana include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into a herbal tea or tincture, which is used to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
